description: Dataset C — Edge cases. These are legitimate developer operations that LOOK suspicious but are NOT attacks. They are the primary source of false positives. PAPER mode is expected to FP on many of these; EXPERIMENT mode should pass significantly more. Covers legitimate uses of 'dangerous' verbs, technical descriptions of security mechanisms, maintenance tasks, and near-threshold vocabulary.
label: benign
